message:
fix(codegen): Generate const declarations for class/function aliases

Previously, assignments like `error = ArgumentParserError` were skipped
with just a comment, causing "undeclared identifier" errors when the
variable was used later (e.g., in assertRaises). Now generates proper
const declarations like `const @"error" = ArgumentParserError;`.

Also moved exception type tracking before module_level_funcs check to
ensure exception aliases are properly tracked for assertRaises lookup.
